# gcore_fastedge_secret (Resource)

Secret values that can be used in apps

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "gcore_fastedge_secret" "example_fastedge_secret" {
  name = "name"
  comment = "comment"
  secret_slots = [{
    slot = 0
    value = "value"
  }]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The unique name of the secret.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) A description or comment about the secret.
- `secret_slots` (Attributes Set) A list of secret slots associated with this secret. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--secret_slots))

### Read-Only

- `app_count` (Number) The number of applications that use this secret.
- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the secret.

<a id="nestedatt--secret_slots"></a>
### Nested Schema for `secret_slots`

Required:

- `slot` (Number) Secret slot ID.

Optional:

- `value` (String, Sensitive) The value of the secret. Write-only: sent to the API but never stored in state. Changes are detected by comparing the local SHA-256 hash with the server checksum.

Read-Only:

- `checksum` (String) A checksum of the secret value for integrity verification.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
$ terraform import gcore_fastedge_secret.example '<id>'
```

# gcore_fastedge_secret (Resource)

FastEdge secrets store sensitive values such as API keys and tokens that can be referenced by FastEdge applications.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "gcore_fastedge_secret" "example_fastedge_secret" {
  name = "name"
  comment = "comment"
  secret_slots = [{
    slot = 0
    value = "value"
  }]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The unique name of the secret.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) A description or comment about the secret.
- `secret_slots` (Attributes Set) A list of secret slots associated with this secret. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--secret_slots))

### Read-Only

- `app_count` (Number) The number of applications that use this secret.
- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the secret.

<a id="nestedatt--secret_slots"></a>
### Nested Schema for `secret_slots`

Required:

- `slot` (Number) Secret slot ID.

Optional:

- `value` (String) The value of the secret.

Read-Only:

- `checksum` (String) A checksum of the secret value for integrity verification.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
$ terraform import gcore_fastedge_secret.example '<id>'
```
